_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in one way hash functions (e.g., Secure Hash Algorithm [SHA], Message Digest Algorithm [MD5]).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of master data management (MDM) principles, including golden record construction, data domain definition, MDM hub architectures, and stewardship workflows.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-019 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.415), AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.411).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.9/10 (raw 0.186). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [algorithm, digest, functions, hash, md5, message] vs WIDAI-only terms [architectures, construction, data, definition, domain, golden] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.826 (P=0.821, R=0.831). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in one way hash functions (e.g., Secure Hash Algorithm [SHA], Message Dige" and "Knowledge of master data management (MDM) principles, including golden record co". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.429 > STS 0.186 (gap +0.244). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [algorithm, digest, functions, hash, md5, message]. WIDAI terms: [architectures, construction, data, definition, domain, golden].
